name: Bathroom Tray Gray - Room Essentials™
description:
Keep your bathroom countertop organized with the help of this Bathroom Tray from Room Essentials™. This gray plastic bathroom tray features a raised lip to help ensure your belongings stay in place and any liquids stay contained. Whether you're looking for a spot to store makeup, skincare essentials or accessories, this tray is a great way to keep your things organized. Best of all, the tray can be hand washed for easy cleaning when it gets dirty.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
